narrative:
Precinct Gnadenhutten (precinct in Tuscarawas County) has 868 registered voters, with 57.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.2%, a narrow Republican lean of 1.7 percentage points.
